89061840.text:
AGENT REPLY — Zoe Lovelock, Paul Fenton (02/07/2026)

HEATING: Confirmed. Oil boiler (Worcester) serves main house only. Annexe has its own independent LPG central heating. ✓

DRAINAGE: Traditional septic tank to soakaway — NOT to watercourse. 2020 General Binding Rules do not apply. Emptied 2 weeks ago. Fully compliant. ✓

BROADBAND: Vendor works from home without issues but unsure of speeds. Check Ofcom checker (TA20 3HG). ⚠

ROAD NOISE: House and road separated by garden and hedgerow (visible on Google Street View). 22-inch thick stone walls. Not noticeable inside unless windows/doors open. ✓

BUILDING CONTROL: Indemnity policy to be obtained "after survey if needed". NOTE: this is not correct — it must be a pre-exchange condition. Solicitor to flag. ⚠

PLOT: All freehold confirmed. No vehicular access to paddock. ✓

NEXT STEPS:
— Check Ofcom broadband at TA20 3HG
— Reply to Zoe requesting viewing dates + confirm BC indemnity timing with solicitor
— Ask about annexe single-level layout, LPG supply details, chain status
